prompt: A small lonely inventor robot sits at a cluttered workbench in a cozy moonlit repair workshop, looking at two empty stools beside it while rain glows on the window. The robot has warm amber eyes, brushed metal body, careful hands, and a gentle expressive face. Tender cinematic 3D animation, warm workbench lamp, blue moonlight through rainy window, family-friendly, no text, no logos, no watermark
